description_long: This is a single-story log cabin with a broad, overhanging gable roof covered in brown shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from interlocking wooden logs, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The front facade features a small covered porch supported by log columns, and a prominent entryway with a wooden awning. Windows are rectangular and framed in dark wood, with a cluster of three on the front and a single window on the side. A stone foundation is visible at the base, adding to the cabin's robust look. A chimney protrudes from the roof, suggesting the presence of a fireplace inside.
description: A rustic log cabin with a wide brown gable roof, covered porch, and multiple rectangular windows framed in dark wood.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabin shows the extended roof and a single window, with the porch partially visible beneath the overhang.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the covered porch, main entryway with a wooden awning, and a cluster of three windows to the right.
description_view_2: The right side displays the long log wall, a single window, and the stone foundation, with the chimney visible on the roof.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a large window and the back wall, with the roof's gable structure clearly visible.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with wide overhangs, covered in brown shingles, featuring a single chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with a cluster of three rectangular windows on the front facade and single windows on each side; all windows are medium-sized and horizontally oriented
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade beneath the porch awning
